[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized anime-style girl with long dark-brown hair and red eyes stands in a bright room, one arm raised behind her head, wearing a white cropped blouse and a dark skirt.

The main subject is a single anime-style person shown from about the waist up to full upper body, posed with both arms raised—her left arm bent behind her head and her right hand resting near or behind her head—looking forward.

The setting appears to be an indoor bathroom or vanity area with light-colored walls and a countertop. Behind and to the left, a cabinet opening shows stacked clear containers or bottles. Near the left edge of the counter are two pump dispensers with light-colored tops and darker bases, placed on a light countertop. To the right, a bright window or doorway with an overexposed white glow creates strong backlighting.

The person has pale skin, long dark brown hair with lighter highlights, and bangs framing her face. Her hair is tied or held up with a dark accessory on top, and some strands fall over her shoulders. She wears a white, loose, long-sleeved cropped blouse with a ribbon-like detail at the neck and a decorative black-and-white emblem shape on the chest. She also wears a black high-waisted pleated skirt with a few visible front buttons. Her pose is centered and slightly angled, with her head tilted forward and her gaze directed toward the viewer. The lighting is high-contrast and bright, with strong highlights on her white clothing and hair, suggesting daylight streaming from the right.

No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image shows a stylized anime-style girl posing in a bright indoor bathroom/vanity setting. She raises her arms near her head while wearing a white cropped blouse and a black pleated skirt.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
